expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: The output explains the required focus areas, but does not demonstrate checkpoint enforcement via Phase 5b artifacts. It states: "There is no Phase 5b runtime output evidence (no checkpoint audit/delta/draft artifacts...) so checkpoint enforcement cannot be verified." Without checkpoint_audit/checkpoint_delta/phase5b draft showing those areas are actually gated, the expectation is not met.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Phase 5b alignment requires producing Phase 5b outputs (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta with valid disposition, and qa_plan_phase5b draft). The output explicitly reports missing required Phase 5b artifacts: "No Phase 5b runtime artifacts were provided (no context/checkpoint_audit..., no context/checkpoint_delta..., no drafts/qa_plan_phase5b...)" ולכן it does not align to phase5b deliverables.
